selectors.sendButton: button[data-testid='send-button'], button[aria-label*='Send message' i], button[aria-label*='Send' i], button[aria-label*='发送' i]
selectors.lastResponse: main [data-last-message='true'] [role='article'], main div[data-testid='assistant-message'], main article[role='article'], main .font-claude-message, div[class*='message'][class*='assistant'], [data-testid='message-content']
selectors.continueButton: button[data-testid='continue-button'], button[aria-label*='Continue generating' i], button[aria-label*='Continue' i], button[aria-label*='继续' i]
selectors.stopButton: button[data-testid='stop-button'], button[aria-label*='Stop generating' i], button[aria-label*='Stop' i], button[aria-label*='停止' i], button[aria-label*='Cancel' i]
